title: Halpiton circuit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Halpiton circuits''' were specialized systems that were part of a [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]] system. The circuits were derived from standard computer components. The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] was equipped with some.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 92|''Star Wars'' (1977) 92]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 92}}
